text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh! Curren! It's you! Can I take a picture?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Of course. ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Curren! Can I have your autograph?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe, if you want it!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Curren! Your pic this morning was sooo
cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thanks for checking!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, when Curren Chan shows up at the training
track...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: One... two... three... Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thaaat's me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More of Curren Chan's fans seem to be gathered
at the track today than usual.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? Of course, silly.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, so that's what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, let me change my answer to
"absoluuutely!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There definitely are a feeew more people here
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But you can never have too many cheerleaders. ♪
I've got this under control.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So don't worry... Just keep your eyes on me, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So don't worry... Just keep your eyes on me, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thaaat's me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: Get out there and show me some sharp running!
Get out there and show me some sharp running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: Get out there and show me some sharp running!
Get out there and show me some sharp running!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm super happy you have such high
expectations of me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I run well, you better give me a bunch of
compliments, 'kay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Squeeee! Curreeen!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwoooosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan runs so fast I think she might break
through the sound barrier.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe... How was that?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪ Praise me some more, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪ Praise me some more, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Gyahhh! She's so cute! Cute Curren Chaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan demonstrates both excellent
concentration and speed.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Boooo, you worry too much.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I know it's just 'cause you really care about
me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sooo...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan stands there for a moment...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before silently raising her hand high.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll have them cheer with the volume on mute
today. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they all understand. After all, my fans
love me. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Witnessing her beautiful show of leadership, I
can't help but say, "Amazing."
